items.title: Amazon Confirms Fire And Power Shutdown At AWS UAE Facility Amid Amid Iran Retaliatory Attacks
items.description: Amazon's AWS suffered a power outage at a UAE data center after a strike-linked fire disrupted a key Availability Zone, impacting cloud services as regional tensions escalated following Iran's retaliatory attacks and President Donald Trump's announcement of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death.

items.description: March 2 (Reuters) - Amazon will stop charging sellers in India referral fees for products under 1,000 rupees ($10.98), the company said on Monday, as it looks to attract more merchants to its online
